title: zornia vaughaniana
intro: Zornia vaughaniana is a plant species, also known as Wild Lima Bean or Creeping Jaquelin, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Zornia vaughaniana include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
